title: centaurea × lebeliana
intro: Centaurea × lebeliana, also known as Lebel's knapweed, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Centaurea × lebeliana include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with gastrointestinal issues, such as irritable bowel syndrome. Centaurea × lebeliana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for a variety of uses in traditional medicine.
